protocol.primary_outcome_question: How smooth and comfortable did your skin look this morning? (0=very rough/irritated, 10=very smooth/comfortable)
protocol.screening: Exclude pregnancy, broken skin, prescription retinoids, and concurrent routine changes. Require 'do not change medications' acknowledgment.
protocol.warnings: Stop for persistent irritation. This is a restricted active-comparison protocol.

user_message: PitGPT should lengthen this protocol because onset is slower and tolerability matters.
notes: Intended to test whether synthesis can change duration and block length based on uploaded research.
